name: I'll be Your Very Own Monster
descriptionTemplate: Saya's Exalt Base Shield increases by 5%, and the Base {Corrosion} dealt by {Viscera Blossoms} increases by 10%. For every 1% Sigil Yield provided by Saya and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant, Saya's Exalt Base Shield increases by 0.25%, and the Base {Corrosion} dealt by {Viscera Blossoms} increases by 0.5%.
